situations.label: 에이스
situations.prompt: tennis player triumphantly celebrating an ace serve, racket raised in victory, electrified expression
situations.animationPrompt: character holds tennis racket in right hand throughout, arm swings forward in a powerful serve arc from ball-toss position overhead down through contact point, then raises racket in triumph as body leans forward with explosive momentum
frames: neutral standing pose, character holds tennis racket in right hand at side, centered and ready
left arm begins to lift upward in ball-toss motion, right arm with racket drops back behind head
left arm fully extended upward at peak toss, right arm cocks racket behind head at maximum backswing
body begins to coil, knees bend slightly, weight shifts to back foot, racket pulled fully back
body uncoils upward, right arm with racket begins sweeping forward and upward toward contact point
right arm with racket reaches contact point overhead at full extension, body fully stretched upward
racket makes contact at peak, arm fully extended, explosive impact expression on face
follow-through begins, racket sweeps down and across body from right to left
racket completes follow-through to left hip area, body weight shifts forward
character leans forward with momentum after serve, triumphant grin spreading
right arm with racket raises upward in victory gesture, fist pump energy
racket held high overhead in triumph, elated celebration expression peaks
both arms raise slightly, racket still in right hand, victorious pose held
body settles back to upright position, racket lowering to side, satisfied smile
character stands tall with racket at side, confident ready expression
neutral standing pose identical to frame 1, racket in right hand, ready for loop

situations.label: 포핸드
situations.prompt: tennis player executing a powerful forehand drive, full body rotation with racket swinging in wide arc

hips halfway through rotation, racket rises to waist height mid-swing, left foot weight shift
contact point reached at waist-to-chest height, racket face square, body fully rotating through
explosive follow-through begins, racket continues upward arc past contact, body fully opened
racket continues sweeping up and across body toward left shoulder in follow-through
racket reaches shoulder height in follow-through, right arm crossing body leftward
racket finishes high over left shoulder, body fully rotated left, triumphant grunt face
hold follow-through peak position, racket over left shoulder, satisfied grin
body begins to unwind from follow-through, racket lowering from left shoulder
body returns toward center, racket coming back to ready position
character resettles into ready stance, racket in right hand at side
neutral ready pose identical to frame 1, racket in right hand, ready for loop

situations.label: 스매시
